meaning: 爱滋病,获得性免疫功能丧失综合症(Acquired Immure Deficiency Syndrome)
examples: He contracted AIDS from a blood transfusion.
They give advice for people with HIV and AIDS.
AIDS lowers the body's resistance to infection.
In AIDS, the drugs can keep people alive for many years, but they are never cured.
The headline we saw back in October was MRSA kills more than people - than AIDS does.
